figures.caption: Table 2. Comparison of different PEFT methods on foundation models for diverse pathologies. The values of mDice and mIoU are presented as percentages.

Fig. 2. TAPE segments retinal layers while achieving superior performance. Rows correspond to the NORMAL class and three disease classes (DR, RVO, and AMD), and columns show labels and segmentation maps generated by TAPE, STLOCT, STL, FFT-DA, FFT-TA, DLoRA, and TLoRA. Segmentation targets include the internal limiting membrane (ILM), inner plexiform layer (IPL), outer plexiform layer (OPL), inner segment/outer segment (ISOS), retinal pigment epithelium (RPE), and Bruch’s membrane (BM).
